dropdown.about_desc: Get to know Akaya Labs and our philosophy

seo.default_title: Akaya Labs — Software Studio for Web, Mobile and Custom Applications
seo.default_description: Independent software studio. Corporate websites, mobile apps, B2B SaaS and macOS utilities — delivered end to end by one team in Rize, Türkiye.
seo.keywords: software studio, web development, mobile app development, SaaS development, B2B platform, macOS app, Next.js, Flutter, .NET, indie studio Türkiye

hero.title: Akaya Labs
hero.tagline: A software studio. Web, mobile, custom — end to end, all under one roof.
hero.intro: Akaya Labs is an independent software studio that turns ideas into shipped products. From corporate websites and mobile apps to B2B dashboards and macOS utilities — every layer is delivered by one team.

capabilities.title: From idea to launch — every layer, one studio.

site.title: Corporate sites and product pages
site.body: Corporate websites, product landing pages, content and blog sites — from design to launch.

ecommerce.title: Online stores and payment infrastructure
ecommerce.body: Online store setup, payment gateway integration, inventory and order management — ready for Turkish and international markets.

app.title: Dashboards and B2B systems
app.body: Admin panels, customer portals, multi-tenant SaaS and bespoke B2B applications.

mobile.title: iOS and Android
mobile.body: App Store and Play Store-ready mobile apps — one team, both platforms shipped in parallel.

systems.title: CRM, ERP, scheduling, membership
systems.body: Corporate software solutions for customer relationships, resource planning, scheduling and membership — bespoke for your operations.

desktop.title: macOS and Windows
desktop.body: macOS menubar utilities, Windows desktop applications and system tools — distributed via App Store, signed DMG or MSI.

process.title: From first conversation to live release — every step transparent.
process.subtitle: Every engagement runs on an agreed roadmap. No surprise invoices, no scope-creep changes.

discovery.title: First conversation
discovery.body: We turn your idea, goals and scope into a clear roadmap. No commitment required.

plan.title: Design and technical plan
plan.body: Interface design, architectural decisions and technology choices. We don't start writing code without an approved plan.

build.title: Build and test
build.body: Iterative deliveries with observability and quality control. Every milestone ships with a live preview.

launch.title: Launch and support
launch.body: Production setup, handover and training. The channel stays open for maintenance and new features after launch.

why.title: We close the gap where agencies usually slip.

single_team.title: Delivered by one team
single_team.body: Design, frontend, backend and mobile — one team, not separate vendors. No handoff loss, one accountable group.

ownership.title: We take ownership
ownership.body: We don't ship and disappear. We treat your product like a partner brand; months later the same people respond.

long_term.title: Long-term support
long_term.body: Delivery isn't the end. The channel stays open for maintenance, scaling and new features — retainer or project-based.

engagement.title: We work on a project basis or via retainer.
engagement.body: We take a limited number of engagements each year. We start with an introductory call and, if there's a fit, align on scope and timeline in writing.

partners.subtitle: We build on the platforms trusted by leading brands.

closing.title: Have a project in mind?
closing.body: We take a small number of engagements each year and pair them with the time they deserve. If you're scoping a SaaS, a mobile product or a focused internal tool, write a few lines about it — you'll hear back within 1–2 business days.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Six products under one roof. Some are live, some are in flight, one belongs to a client.
products.intro: Products developed by Akaya Labs for our own brands and clients. Each one designed and shipped by a single team.

pulsewatch.name: PulseWatch
pulsewatch.blurb: Website monitoring platform — uptime, performance and alert management in one dashboard.

snapslim.name: SnapSlim
snapslim.blurb: Photo compression for iOS. Smaller files, same look — kept on-device.

cleanlock.name: CleanLock
cleanlock.blurb: A keyboard-cleaning helper for macOS — temporarily locks the screen, keys and trackpad so you can wipe your keyboard safely.

hesaplyor.name: hesaplyor.com
hesaplyor.blurb: A growing collection of free, ad-supported calculators for everyday math.

away-kingdom.name: Away Kingdom
away-kingdom.blurb: A digital-detox strategy game — the longer you stay away from your phone, the more resources you collect to grow your kingdom.

cevre-sikayet.name: Çevre Şikâyet
cevre-sikayet.blurb: An end-to-end municipal complaint platform that lets citizens report environmental issues with photo, location and a tracking code — developed and delivered by Akaya Labs.

about.title: Company
about.intro: Akaya Labs is an independent software studio that turns clients' ideas into shipped products. Below you'll find who we are, how we work, and the principles we operate by.

vision.title: Few engagements done well. We grow the work, not the headcount.
vision.lede: Akaya Labs aims to grow in the nature of its work — not in scale.

scale.heading: Not scale, substance
scale.body: Akaya Labs is deliberately structured to avoid becoming a large agency. Departmentalised structures, hierarchical approval chains and processes that leave the client without a single point of contact tend to erode the natural quality of software work. Instead, we take a limited number of engagements each year and keep the team intentionally small, preserving the maximum attention we can give to every project. This choice constrains the revenue line in the short term, but in the long term it compounds the quality of our portfolio and the depth of client satisfaction.

longevity.heading: Products that still work years later
longevity.body: The real scorecard for a software studio is not the number of projects shipped last month; it is whether the products delivered three years ago are still running cleanly today. That is the measure Akaya Labs holds itself to. The longevity of the products we deliver, the multi-year partnerships with our clients, and the quality of the growing portfolio are, for us, a single dashboard. A new engagement is often less about acquiring a new client and more about deepening an existing relationship.

partnership.heading: A client portfolio, not a sales pipeline
partnership.body: The standard agency model targets at least ten new clients per year, and that target tends to put sales ahead of product. For Akaya Labs, the unit is a client portfolio, not a sales pipeline. Building deep, multi-year partnerships with a small number of clients serves both the studio and the client in the long term. Every engagement we deliver is treated as the start of a relationship we expect to still hold ten years from now.

discipline.heading: Disciplined growth
discipline.body: We do not reject growth; we hold that the quality of growth must come before its volume. Taking on more work and expanding the team would reduce average cost — and, unfortunately, reduce average quality at the same rate. Akaya Labs makes a different choice: we grow professionally by taking on work of higher value and complexity. We may, one day, work alongside one or two senior collaborators; that growth would deepen the existing discipline, not departmentalise it.

mission.title: A precise, fast, premium and finishing development process.
mission.lede: Akaya Labs' promise to clients can be summarised in a single sentence: delivered on the date agreed, at the quality promised, without surprises.

precision.heading: Precise
precision.body: Akaya Labs contracts do not contain vague phrases like 'included in scope' or 'we'll figure it out later'. Every engagement begins, before the contract is signed, with a written scope document that defines as clearly what will be built as what will not. Any changes, additional costs or schedule shifts that emerge during the engagement are re-aligned in writing. We do not put surprise invoices in front of clients; respecting discipline is a corporate behaviour for us, not a marketing promise.

speed.heading: Fast
speed.body: The software industry tends to fail in two characteristic ways: at one end, half-finished MVPs shipped in two weeks; at the other, ambitious engagements that begin as 'six months' and stretch into a two-year scope creep. Akaya Labs stays away from both. We honour the timeline we committed to, and if it changes, the reason and the revised date are communicated together. For us, speed is not delivering quickly — it is keeping the word that was given.

premium.heading: Premium
premium.body: We combine large-agency engineering standards with a boutique studio's discipline of ownership. This is a concrete set of decisions: performance, accessibility, security and sustainability are committed to at project kickoff, not layered in retroactively. The code we write should be clean, documented and maintainable for a developer reading it two years after launch. Premium, for us, is not a marketing adjective — it is an engineering standard visible in every file we deliver.

finished.heading: We finish what we start
finished.body: Many studios ship a product, offer a thirty-day 'support window', and then step away. That model is not sustainable for either the long-term health of the product or the client relationship. Akaya Labs operates differently: the channel stays open after launch for maintenance, scaling, new feature work and bug fixes. Through maintenance clauses in the initial contract or a retainer arrangement, the client continues to receive responses from the same studio and the same developer.

discipline.heading: Disciplined
discipline.body: The values of a studio are, in practice, the filters it applies at the intake stage. For Akaya Labs those filters are clear: we do not design manipulative patterns, fabricated urgency, deceptive free-to-paid funnels or hidden subscriptions. We do not build software for gambling, betting or fraud-driven business models. These are not marketing lines but a corporate discipline, raised openly in the first conversation, and, where necessary, leading to declining the engagement.

manifesto.lede: Disciplined software. Delivery that keeps its word.
manifesto.p1: Akaya Labs is an independent software studio that turns clients' ideas into shipped products. From interface design to frontend, from server to mobile, from infrastructure setup through to live support, every layer is planned, built and delivered by the same team. This structure removes the cross-layer handoff loss typical of traditional agency models; the client always has a single point of contact and responsibility is never diluted.
manifesto.p2: We keep our distance from both extremes the software industry tends toward: the half-finished MVP rushed out in two weeks, and the ambitious engagement that stretches over two years and never actually ships. For Akaya Labs, the right pace is the pace at which a word can be kept. We honour the agreed timeline; when something needs to change, the reason and the revised schedule arrive together, and any additional cost is presented for client approval before an invoice is issued.
manifesto.p3: Premium product, boutique scale is a principle, not a tagline. We take a limited number of engagements each year so every project receives the time, attention and post-launch care it deserves. This choice constrains the studio's revenue line in the short term; in the long term it directly compounds the quality of the portfolio, the depth of the partnerships built with clients, and the longevity of the products delivered.
manifesto.p4: We do not design dark patterns or interfaces that manipulate the user, and we do not build software for gambling, betting or fraud-driven business models. These are not pleasant lines tacked onto a contract; they are corporate filters openly raised in the first conversation and, where required, leading to declining the engagement. Discipline and ethics are not marketing for Akaya Labs — they are the foundation of how the studio works.

story.title: Akaya — calm, lasting and consistent.
story.p1: Our name carries both a sense of care and inherited memory. The gold ring on the logo — an enso from the sumi-e tradition — represents the beauty of the impermanent and a steady resolve drawn in a single stroke.
story.p2: The mountain silhouettes inside the ring are a nod to the Black Sea geography of Türkiye; quiet but rooted, making room for everything that grows on it. The sakura petal stands for softness; the crimson stamp for the accountability sitting beneath every product.
story.p3: Working with this palette is not coincidental. Like every Akaya Labs product, the brand identity is a slow, careful, and owned decision.

values.title: The working values that make Akaya Labs Akaya Labs.
values.lede: Beyond brand identity, three core values shape how we work with clients.

team.title: One team, one point of accountability
team.body: In a typical digital agency model the designer may sit at one company, the frontend with another freelancer, the backend with a subcontractor and the mobile work with a third team. The inevitable outcome of this structure is handoff loss: information degrades at every transition, responsibility is spread thin, and defects fall into the 'not my area' boundary unowned. Akaya Labs rejects that model outright; every layer is built by the same team. A decision taken in the design file is taken by someone who understands how it will land in code. The client always knows whom to ask.

longterm.title: Long-term maintenance
longterm.body: The real life of a software product begins on the day it ships, not during delivery. Akaya Labs treats post-launch performance, maintenance, security updates and scaling as first-class concerns rather than optional add-ons. Both contract-based maintenance arrangements and retainer-style long-term partnerships are available. We do not move on the moment the product is live; post-launch support is the foundation of the long-term relationship with the client.

quality.title: Agency-grade quality, independent studio
quality.body: When a client chooses Akaya Labs, they receive the engineering quality and process discipline of a large agency together with the flexibility and ownership of a small studio. Code quality, documentation, test coverage, observability and security standards are held at corporate level regardless of the project's size. For Akaya Labs, operating as an independent studio does not mean working to a lower standard; it means offering a more personal service.

approach.title: How we partner with our clients.

partnership.title: Partner, not vendor
partnership.body: In the traditional agency model the client corresponds with a vendor to obtain a digital product; the vendor finishes the design, writes the code, sends an invoice and leaves. Akaya Labs finds that model insufficient. We approach the client as a technology partner that accounts for the long-term health of the product. Decisions are made together rather than over written notes; architectural choices, scaling plans, third-party dependencies and long-term maintenance costs are discussed openly. Risks are surfaced before they materialise, not after.

scope.title: Written scope, no surprises
scope.body: Every project begins with an agreed, written scope document. It defines the technical requirements, the delivery schedule, the payment plan, the number of revisions included and what falls outside the engagement. Changes that emerge during the project are aligned through an additional written agreement before they are added to scope; any extra cost or schedule shift is presented for client approval before an invoice is issued. 'We'll see later' and 'let's not discuss it now' do not appear in Akaya Labs contracts.

communication.title: Right channel, fast response
communication.body: Client communication is conducted through a single official channel agreed at the start of the contract, rather than across a fragmented set of tools. That channel — email, corporate messaging or a project management tool, chosen to fit the engagement — is held constant throughout. Official matters receive a response within one or two business days; a separate fast channel can be defined for technical emergencies. The client always speaks with the same person through the same channel; there are no team rotations or 'we've assigned you a new account manager' interruptions.

ownership.title: Ownership stays with the client
ownership.body: Everything produced — source code, design files, brand assets, user data, server and service access keys — always belongs to the client. Any copies retained on the Akaya Labs side are reference-only; if the client requests it on day one, access is handed over immediately. Should the client decide to work with another developer or studio, the handover runs cleanly, because architectural choices, third-party dependencies and any hidden configuration are documented from the outset. The Akaya Labs business model relies on clients choosing to continue the partnership, not on lock-in.

founder.name: Ahmet Karaca
founder.bio: Solo developer based in Rize, Türkiye. Designs, builds and ships every product under the Akaya Labs roof.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Collaboration, licensing or a plain question — this is the place.

footer.about: Independent software studio. Web, mobile and custom applications — one team, end to end.
